LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MORGAN TIRE & AUTO, LLC DBA WHEEL WORKS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR DEFENDING AGAINST BAD FAITH ANTI-SLAPP MOTION IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION WAS FRIVOLOUS SINCE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS PREMISED ENTIRELY ON PLAINTIFF'S CONDUCT IN FILLING OUT EMPLOYMENT FORMS. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED $17,500 JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S AND THEIR ATTORNEYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MORGAN TIRE & AUTO, LLC DBA WHEEL WORKS' MOTION For Attorney'S Fees Against Plaintiff's Counsel For Defending Against Bad Faith Anti-Slapp Motion IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION WAS FRIVOLOUS SINCE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS PREMISED ENTIRELY ON PLAINTIFF'S CONDUCT IN FILLING OUT EMPLOYMENT FORMS. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED $17,500 JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S AND THEIR ATTORNEYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
